title: Systemverilog cast operation results in syntax error
body:
It looks like yosys is having some troubles with the cast operation. Most lint tools require explicit casts to prevent accidental truncations, so it would be nice to get this supported or at least ignored, rather than throwing up a syntax error.

## Steps to reproduce the issue

> cat cast_test.v
module casting_test(out_data);
   output [6:0] out_data;
   parameter RESCALE = 5;
   assign out_data = 7'(RESCALE);
endmodule

> yosys -p "read_verilog -sv cast_test.v"
[...]
-- Running command 'read_verilog -sv cast_test.v' --
Executing Verilog-2005 frontend.
Parsing SystemVerilog input from `cast_test.v' to AST representation.
ERROR: Parser error in line cast_test.v:4: syntax error, unexpected $undefined


## Expected behavior

Out_data should be 7'd5

## Actual behavior

Yosys is throwing a syntax error.
